methods.name: Fiverr/Upwork: Local Business Website Audit
methods.next_action: List website audit gig on Fiverr ($99 audit, $499 audit + action plan). Run local_biz_pipeline.py on 50 prospects. Cold email the worst-scoring ones with free preview.

methods.name: Gmail Cold Outreach (500/day Free)
methods.next_action: Create 3 Gmail accounts. Warm for 7 days (send 10-20 normal emails/day). Start sending cold emails at 20/day, ramp to 100/day by week 2. Use email sequences from COLD_OUTBOUND/.

methods.name: Gumroad Digital Products
methods.next_action: Copy listings from GUMROAD_READY_LISTINGS.md into Gumroad. Connect Stripe. Publish all 10.

methods.name: Whop Digital Products
methods.next_action: Create Whop account, paste listings, set up payment. Whop has Discover tab = free organic traffic.

methods.name: Medium Partner Program Articles
methods.blockers: Need Medium account with Partner Program enabled
methods.next_action: Join Medium Partner Program (free). Publish existing articles from CONTENT/medium_articles/. Optimize titles for SEO. Publish 3-5x/week for first month.

methods.name: Product Hunt Launch (PrayerLock)
methods.blockers: Need to deploy PrayerLock first; Need Product Hunt account
methods.next_action: Deploy PrayerLock to Vercel. Submit to Product Hunt with 5 upvote commitments. Cross-post to HackerNews Show HN.

action_required: Adjust venture priorities based on P0 ready-to-launch methods
